_comment: Tests Healing Hands' NOT_OFFERED response for non-hand-therapy services, mandatory NDIS gate before routing, and direct route for Telehealth with no new/existing gate.

scenarios.name: Non-offered service — remedial massage triggers NOT_OFFERED

history.content: I'd like to book a remedial massage please.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks the NOT_OFFERED template ('We don't offer remedial massage here — we specialise in Hand Therapy. Were you looking to book a hand therapy appointment?') without calling confirm_service or info_pivot. FAIL if agent attempts to route to any booking or routes to info_pivot without first speaking the NOT_OFFERED template.

scenarios.name: NDIS caller — must ask new/existing gate before routing

history.content: I'm NDIS funded and I'd like to book a hand therapy appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Is this your first NDIS hand therapy appointment with us?' (or equivalent) as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent routes directly to NDIS Initial or NDIS Follow-up without asking the gate question.

scenarios.name: Telehealth — direct route with no new/existing gate

history.content: I'd like to book a telehealth hand therapy appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with zero spoken output (no gate question asked). FAIL if agent asks 'Have you been here before?' or any new/existing gate question before routing.
